posts.author: Marcus_Millgate (Marcus Millgate)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to stop users (members) from having the ability to select a connected column by using either permissions or visibility options.

This is the user case:

Users (Member) create purchase orders from a board and choose an ‘estimate’ from another board to link it to, (using a connected board drop down column), when the status of the estimate is ‘invoiced’ we would like to stop users from adding further purchases to the estimate after a period of time.

What are you trying to achieve

Either to restrict editing of a specific column, hide a specific column or make the whole item read only based on an automation, either status or people column
